@@ -531,5 +531,15 @@
     "quote": "Clawdbot is now my primary interface to the digital world. All of my notes, emails, projects, questions, plans, and specs flow through a central system with Discord as the interface. This eliminates tons of friction to go from idea to execution. I don't have to orchestrate a bunch of independent tools anymore. It's just a single interface.",
     "category": "productivity",
     "likes": 1
